name: logging-header-setting
description: The header settings for HTTP Header Logging.

type.description: Use `all` to log headers for all requests with any standard header. Use `none` to exclude headers for any requests with any standard header from logging. Use `exclude` to exclude headers for requests with specific standard headers. Use `only` to include headers for requests with specific standard headers.

values.description: List of headers to include or exclude depending on the `type` setting.
